translations.en: Naxatilor
translations.zh: 納薩蒂

translations.en: a dark, rough-skinned gargoyle.
translations.zh: 膚色幽暗、皮膚粗糙之魔像。

translations.en: The venerable gargoyle does not acknowledge your presence.
translations.zh: 這位德高望重的魔像對你的到來置若罔聞。

translations.en: "To have nothing to say to you, False Prophet!"
translations.zh: 「對偽先知，吾無話可說！」

translations.en: "To greet you again, $P."
translations.zh: 「再次問候，$P。」

translations.en: "To greet you, $P, Avatar of the Underworld."
translations.zh: 「問候汝，$P，幽冥界之聖者。」

translations.en: "To see the Amulet of Submission around your neck."
translations.zh: 「見汝頸間佩有臣服護符。」

translations.en: "To consider your acceptance of this both noble and wise."
translations.zh: 「汝之接受，吾視之為高貴且明智之舉。」

translations.en: "To observe by your aura that such honorable deeds are rare for you."
translations.zh: 「觀汝靈光，此等榮譽之舉於汝甚是罕見。」

translations.en: "To not be surprised, then, that you are @fated to destroy a world."
translations.zh: 「如此，汝@fated命中注定毀滅一個世界，亦不足為奇。」

translations.en: "To observe by your aura that you are not a being of evil."
translations.zh: 「觀汝靈光，汝並非邪惡之輩。」

translations.en: "To regret for your sake, then, that you are @fated to destroy a world."
translations.zh: 「如此，汝@fated命中注定毀滅一個世界，吾為汝深感惋惜。」

translations.en: "To observe by your aura that you are truly a being of honor."
translations.zh: 「觀汝靈光，汝確為榮譽之人。」

translations.en: "To be surprised, then, that you are @fated to destroy a world."
translations.zh: 「如此，汝@fated命中注定毀滅一個世界，令吾大感訝異。」

translations.en: "To have spoken to Scholar Valkadesh?"
translations.zh: 「已與學者瓦卡德許一談否？」

translations.en: "Then surely to know what harm you have caused my world!"
translations.zh: 「則汝必知已對吾之世界造成何等傷害！」

translations.en: "To have no @choice but to return the Codex!"
translations.zh: 「別無@choice選擇，唯有歸還守則之書！」

translations.en: "To have wreaked great havoc in this land by your theft of the Codex!"
translations.zh: 「汝竊取守則之書，已在此地造成巨大禍害！」

translations.en: "To have no @choice but to return it!"
translations.zh: 「別無@choice選擇，唯有歸還！」

translations.en: "To see only two alternatives: to return the @Codex, or to give up your life."
translations.zh: 「唯見兩途：歸還@Codex守則之書，或獻出汝之性命。」

translations.en: "Hss...Yes, to know of the three meanings of that word."
translations.zh: 「嘶……是，此詞有三重含義，吾知之。」

translations.en: "To ask to which type of sacrifice you refer: @self, @others or items of @value?"
translations.zh: 「問汝所指何種犧牲：@self自我、@others他人，抑或@value貴重之物？」

translations.en: "To admire your willingness to sacrifice your life for the good of my people."
translations.zh: 「汝願以性命換取吾族福祉，吾甚為敬佩。」

translations.en: "But to doubt that that is the meaning of the prophecy."
translations.zh: 「然吾懷疑此並非預言之真意。」

translations.en: "What?!"
"To suggest that you can atone for your misdeed by bathing in the blood of others?!"
translations.zh: 「汝竟暗示可以沐浴他人之血來洗清罪行？！」

translations.en: "To find such thoughts well in keeping with the blackness of your aura!"
translations.zh: 「此等念頭與汝陰暗之靈光可謂相稱！」

translations.en: "To find such thoughts unworthy of your honorable aura!"
translations.zh: 「此等念頭有辱汝榮譽之靈光！」

translations.en: "To know of only one item of true value--the Codex itself."
translations.zh: 「吾所知唯一真正有價值之物——正是守則之書本身。」

translations.en: "Surely not to destroy the Codex!?"
translations.zh: 「難道要毀掉守則之書？！」

translations.en: "To direct you to go to the Hall of Knowledge, south of here."
translations.zh: 「指引汝前往此處南方之智識之殿。」

translations.en: "There to read the Book of Ritual."
translations.zh: 「在彼處研讀儀典之書。」

translations.en: "There also to get the Vortex Lens!"
translations.zh: 「亦在彼處取得渦旋透鏡！」

translations.en: "Then to return here, where I will tell you what must be done!"
translations.zh: 「而後返回此處，吾將告知汝必須做之事！」

translations.en: "To be able to see the @Vortex from both sides of the world!"
translations.zh: 「從世界兩側皆能看見@Vortex渦旋！」

translations.en: "To benefit both races equally if the Codex is @returned there!"
translations.zh: 「若守則之書@returned歸還彼處，兩族皆可平等受益！」

translations.en: "To be called Naxatilor."
translations.zh: 「吾名納薩蒂。」

translations.en: "To be a seer, mystic advisor to my people."
translations.zh: 「吾乃預言者，吾族之神秘顧問。」

translations.en: "But to be unable to avert what is written in the Book of Prophecies."
translations.zh: 「然吾無力阻止預言之書中所載之事。」

translations.en: "To be sure to show the human lensmaker the Vortex Lens."
translations.zh: 「務必將渦旋透鏡展示給人類造透鏡者看。」

translations.en: "Also to be sure to tell the human lensmaker that his lens must be concave!"
translations.zh: 「亦務必告知人類造透鏡者，其所製之透鏡必須是凹面！」

translations.en: "To be most important--concave!"
translations.zh: 「此乃重中之重——凹面！」

translations.en: "To know not where the Codex is."
translations.zh: 「吾不知守則之書在何處。」

translations.en: "But to remember that Captain Bolesh just returned from the Codex!"
translations.zh: 「然記得隊長波列許方才剛從守則之書處歸來！」

translations.en: "To suggest you seek him. To try the healer's house to the north."
translations.zh: 「建議汝去尋他。到北方醫者之居所試試。」

translations.en: "To find the Vortex Lens in the Hall of Knowledge, south of here."
translations.zh: 「渦旋透鏡在此處南方之智識之殿。」

translations.en: "Farewell! To return when you have visited the Hall of Knowledge!"
translations.zh: 「告別！待汝拜訪智識之殿後再來！」

translations.en: "Farewell, $P. To return when there is more we can discuss."
translations.zh: 「告別，$P。待有更多可談之事時再來。」

translations.en: "To have no time to discuss that."
translations.zh: 「吾無暇討論此事。」

translations.en: "Yes, to see that the Vortex Lens is no longer whole."
translations.zh: 「是，見渦旋透鏡已不再完整。」

translations.en: "To go to the lensmaker, whose house is northeast of here."
translations.zh: 「前往造透鏡者處，其居所在此處東北方。」

translations.en: "To get the lens repaired there!"
translations.zh: 「在彼處將透鏡修復！」

translations.en: "Then to return here with the whole lens!"
translations.zh: 「而後攜完整之透鏡返回此處！」

translations.en: "To require the Vortex Lens, foolish human!"
translations.zh: 「需要渦旋透鏡，愚蠢的人類！」

translations.en: "To waste no more time!"
translations.zh: 「莫再虛耗時光！」

translations.en: "To go to the @Hall of Knowledge and get the lens!"
translations.zh: 「前往@Hall智識之殿取得透鏡！」

translations.en: "To bring it to me personally, Avatar!"
translations.zh: 「親自帶回給吾，聖者！」

translations.en: "Good, to see that you have the Vortex Lens."
translations.zh: 「甚好，見汝已持有渦旋透鏡。」

translations.en: "To have read the Book of Ritual as well?"
translations.zh: 「亦已研讀儀典之書否？」

translations.en: "Then to go to the Hall of Knowledge and do so!"
translations.zh: 「那便前往智識之殿去讀！」

translations.en: "Good. To be unable to reverse the ritual myself."
translations.zh: 「甚好。吾本身無法逆轉此儀式。」

translations.en: "But to know that the Codex itself will say how to return it to the Vortex."
translations.zh: 「然守則之書本身將說明如何歸還至渦旋。」

translations.en: "To know also that you will need a second lens."
translations.zh: 「亦知汝將需要第二枚透鏡。」

translations.en: "To require a human-crafted @lens, so that your people may also see the @Codex."
translations.zh: 「需要人類製作之@lens透鏡，使汝之族人亦能看見@Codex守則之書。」

translations.en: "To be utterly without hope in the face of such ignorance."
translations.zh: 「面對如此無知，吾已絕望至極。」

translations.en: "To refuse to converse with a daemon."
translations.zh: 「吾拒絕與惡魔交談。」

translations.en: "Perhaps to have another alternative..."
translations.zh: 「或有另一途徑……」

translations.en: "Yes! To return the Codex to the @Vortex!"
translations.zh: 「是！將守則之書歸還@Vortex渦旋！」

translations.en: "To then be available to @both our peoples!"
translations.zh: 「如此可讓@both兩族共享！」

translator_notes: 納薩蒂為魔像族神秘預言者，語氣莊嚴睿智，對 Avatar 靈光的解讀因玩家選擇而異。核心使命：返還渦旋透鏡、歸還守則之書。凹面透鏡（concave）為重要 quest 資訊，特別保留。
